sub_modules.fp_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 single-precision operand unpacker. Extracts sign, exponent, fraction, 24-bit significand, unbiased exponent, and zero/subnormal/infinity/NaN flags.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Combinational early special-case classifier. Computes result sign and forwarded NaN, infinity, and zero result flags using IEEE-754 priority rules including 0 × infinity invalid operation.
sub_modules.fp_mul_exp: Combinational datapath stage that multiplies the two 24-bit significands into a 48-bit product and adds the unbiased exponents.
sub_modules.fp_normalize: Combinational normalization stage. Locates the product leading bit, normalizes the significand, adjusts the exponent, and generates guard, round, and sticky bits.
sub_modules.fp_round_nearest_even: Combinational IEEE round-to-nearest-even stage for the normalized 24-bit significand, including carry-out exponent correction.
sub_modules.fp_pack_result: Combinational final packer. Applies special-case priority, overflow to signed infinity, underflow flush to signed zero, and packs the normal IEEE-754 single-precision result.
